method: Each eligible skater contract is scored as-of its signing date: fair value = 0.75×term-matched WAR value + 0.25×production comps, with the WAR anchor frozen from the signing-summer outcomes ledger and the comp pool restricted to earlier signings (no hindsight). Letters are cap-share bands centered on realized-outcome quantiles from 1,721 historical skater signings (held-out Spearman +0.564). Older deals with no frozen WAR anchor fall back to a current-model reconstruction — not a frozen signing-date forecast — and their receipts say so. Goalies are not yet graded.
